stories.headline: Sam Neill’s Cause of Death Revealed - Rolling Stone
stories.summary: Two days after Sam Neill's death, the beloved actor's cause of death has been revealed.
stories.why: Neill's death marks the end of an era for guys who grew up watching Jurassic Park and The Hunt for the Wildebeest Green—he was the everyman action hero who made you believe a paleontologist could be cool.

stories.headline: Dave Kendall, Former MTV Host, Dies - The Hollywood Reporter
stories.summary: Matt Pinfield broke the news on social media.
stories.why: Kendall was MTV's bridge between 80s nostalgia and 90s cool; his death signals the final fade of that network's cultural dominance when music videos actually mattered to your generation.

stories.headline: Matt Reeves Shares First Look At Robert Pattinson In ‘The Batman Part II’ - Deadline
stories.summary: The Batman Part II has been delayed until 2028, but Matt Reeves shared a teaser of the upcoming film that returns Robert Pattinson to the Batman role.
stories.why: Pattinson's Batman became the definitive brooding, blue-collar version for your age group—this teaser confirms the trilogy that's reshaping superhero cinema gets to finish its story despite the delay.

stories.headline: Taylor Frankie Paul Granted Temporary Restraining Order Against Ex's Friend - TMZ
stories.summary: Taylor Frankie Paul's taken a few Ls this year ... but she just won big in court and was granted her temporary restraining order against her ex's friend, TMZ has learned.
stories.why: This is celebrity legal drama noise that doesn't matter unless you're tracking influencer culture; skip it.

stories.headline: 'The Odyssey' in IMAX 70mm is available at these 25 theater locations - USA Today
stories.summary: Only a limited number of theaters are screening "The Odyssey" in director Christopher Nolan's preferred format. Here's where.
stories.why: Nolan treating a 2,400-year-old epic as a theatrical event (not a streaming dump) signals that 70mm cinema still exists as a flex for guys who care about how movies are supposed to look.

stories.headline: Turns Out ‘Avatar Aang: The Last Airbender’ Will Yip Its Way Into Select Theaters After All - Gizmodo
stories.summary: For one week only, 'Avatar' fans in Los Angeles and Manhattan will get to see the Gaang on the silver screen.
stories.why: The live-action Avatar flop getting a theatrical window for the original anime is a cultural reset moment—it proves the blue-people version failed so badly that nostalgia for the superior show now has box office power.

stories.headline: ‘Moana’ flops, but Disney’s remake engine rolls on - KTLA
stories.summary: By all measurements, Disney’s live-action remake of Moana has failed to live up to expectations, both with critics and at the box office. After debuting to just $95 million globally in its opening we…
stories.why: Disney's remake strategy is finally hitting a wall with audiences your age; Moana's failure suggests you're done pretending live-action updates improve on originals.

stories.headline: R. Kelly asks President Trump to commute 31-year prison sentence - USA Today
stories.summary: R. Kelly is seeking commutation of his combined 31-year-prison sentence for racketeering, sex trafficking, child pornography and enticement.
stories.why: R. Kelly's clemency plea under Trump represents the return of a pre-MeToo calculation that powerful men might escape accountability—this is a real test of whether cultural reckoning actually sticks or just pauses.
